debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit p (ZMod p)) (cr : Circuit p (ℕ × ZMod p)) (G : List (Entry (ZMod p) (ℕ × ZMod p))),
    wf G cl cr →
      List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup p inst✝ (ZMod p) cr
